name: ESCALON MEDICAL CORP
summary: Escalon Medical Corp. is a Pennsylvania corporation that develops, manufactures, markets, and distributes medical devices for ophthalmic applications. Key products include A-Scan and B-Scan ultrasound devices, UBM high-frequency ultrasound, pachymeters, intraocular gases (C3F8 and SF6), disposable surgical packs for vitreoretinal surgery, and the AXIS Image Management system. Products are sold globally through independent sales representatives, distributors, and internal sales staff to medical institutions.

products.name: A-Scan
products.description: Ultrasound device measuring internal eye structures and distances, primarily used to calculate lens implant power.

products.name: B-Scan
products.description: Diagnostic ultrasound tool providing two-dimensional images of internal eye structures when media are opaque.

products.name: UBM (Ultrasound Biomicroscope)
products.description: High-frequency ultrasound device for detailed anterior segment imaging, used in glaucoma and tumor evaluation.

products.name: Pachymeter
products.description: Ultrasound-based device measuring corneal thickness for intraocular pressure calculation and refractive surgery planning.

products.name: Ispan Intraocular Gases (C3F8 and SF6)
products.description: Intraocular gases distributed for use as temporary tamponade in detached retina surgery.

products.name: Disposable Universal Gas Kit
products.description: Patented disposable kit delivering intraocular gas from canister to patient during vitreoretinal surgery.

products.name: Surgical Packs
products.description: Disposable surgical packs used in vitreoretinal surgery, including packs for injecting and extracting silicone oil.

products.name: AXIS Image Management
products.description: Web-based system managing ophthalmic diagnostic images from any device, modality, or location.

products.name: A-Scan

products.name: Ispan Intraocular Gases

products.name: Surgical Packs

products.name: AXIS Image Management

partnerships.description: Non-exclusive distribution agreement under which Escalon distributes AirGas intraocular gases in canisters.
Non-exclusive distribution agreement for intraocular gases C3F8 and SF6 packaged in canisters.
